name: Critical Banking App Demo
description: Enterprise banking application demo: web portal + JBoss fan-out tier + Oracle RAC + MQ broker deployed on a PRIMARY site with DR switchover to a secondary site. Rebuild commands are wired to a mock XL Deploy / XL Release CLI to demonstrate AppControl as a control plane on top of existing deployment tooling. All state is file-based under %TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\<site>\*.running so the demo runs without any real middleware.

components.name: Oracle RAC
components.start_cmd: if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\primary" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\primary" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\primary\oracle-rac.running"

site_overrides.start_cmd_override: if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\dr" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\dr" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\dr\oracle-rac.running"

components.start_cmd: if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\primary" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\primary" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\primary\mq-series.running"

site_overrides.start_cmd_override: if not exist "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\dr" mkdir "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\dr" && type nul > "%TEMP%\appcontrol-demo-rebuild\dr\mq-series.running"
